message:
fix(hypothesis-lifecycle): allow LOCK_PREDICTION from active state

Previously, LOCK_PREDICTION was only available from "draft" state,
meaning after locking the first prediction (which transitions to
"active"), users couldn't lock additional predictions. This was a bug
since lockedPredictions is an array designed to hold multiple entries.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
